builder_claims.claim: All four Stage-0 P0 receipt producers were remediated with explicit external-finalization taxonomy split.
Legacy checker was run in delta mode only for the four P0 producers.
Stage 1 can be considered with warnings once Inquisitor/Speculum reviews this remediation commit.

ALLOW_STAGE1 remains candidate-only until independent Inquisitor/Speculum commit review completes.
